channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260406)
item.description:
What's New

feat: make free mark always-on and add single-instance guard

  • Remove vFreeMark config variable and UI toggle (free mark is now always enabled)
  • Clean up related code in VNEngine, SharedSettings, Preferences, GeneralSection
  • Add single-instance guard in AppDelegate to prevent duplicate instances
  • New instance terminates old instance(s) and takes over, ensuring only one XKey runs

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
